title: Dmg Water
description: A hardcore Minecraft mod where water becomes deadly. Touching water deals continuous damage until death. Perfect for extreme survival challenges and custom maps.
body:
**Dmg Water** completely changes how you play Minecraft:

- Any water source becomes lethal.
- Players take continuous damage on contact.
- Fully multiplayer-compatible for fun challenges with friends.

This mod is great for:

- Hardcore survival players.
- Map creators who want unique mechanics.
- Streamers looking for exciting new challenges.
